column1: Equity Exposures Subject to the Simple Risk Weight Approach
Total Credit Risk-Weighted Assets Subject to Supervisory 6% Multiplier (2)
Less: Excess Eligible Credit Reserves Not Included in Tier 2 capital

(1) Primarily consists of net deferred tax assets, net premises and equipment, receivables, intangible assets and other assets not subject to the application of internal models in deriving credit risk-weighted assets under the U.S. Basel III rules.
(2) Under the U.S. Basel III rules, a supervisory 6% multiplier is applied to all components of credit risk-weighted assets other than derivatives CVA.
(3) Includes $2,642 million and $1,989 million add-on for Risk Not In the Model (RNIM) as of June 30, 2024 and March 31, 2024, respectively.
(4) Includes $5,020 million and $10,097 million add-on for RNIM as of June 30, 2024 and March 31, 2024, respectively.
(5) Includes $128 million and $36 million add-on for RNIM as of June 30, 2024 and March 31, 2024, respectively.
(6) Includes specific risk charges attributable to securitization positions, as well as non-modeled correlation trading securitization positions.
(7) Includes $694 million and $410 million of risk weighted assets arising from de minimis exposures for June 30, 2024 and March 31, 2024 respectively.
